02-multi-actions.title: Multiple Actions
02-multi-actions.description: A primary action button grouped with secondary actions and an options menu.

03-joined-toggle.title: Joined Toggle Buttons
03-joined-toggle.description: Multiple buttons grouped together for view/mode selection with active state indication.

04-sub-stack-actions.title: Sub Stack Actions
04-sub-stack-actions.description: A collection of buttons and inputs arranged horizontally for grouped actions and filtering.

05-split-action-button.title: Split Action Button
05-split-action-button.description: A split button for bulk actions with dynamic icons, variants, and async feedback while keeping the primary action easy to repeat.
